backend/main.mo: Main actor handling authorization, storage mixins, booking lead creation, user profiles, rate card uploads, and enforcing site-deleted restrictions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module mapping old actor state into the new format by transforming lead entries.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking features to frontend files, components, and test IDs with high-confidence metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of key frontend files and components across the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global CSS defining theme variables and light/dark mode styling for the app.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the React app and loading the main entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component managing routing, identity state, site-deleted checks, and page rendering logic.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: Layout shell rendering header, navigation, avatar menu, and share dialog with behavior gated by site-deleted and authorization states.
frontend/src/components/BrandLogo.tsx: Component displaying square or wide variants of the BISMI CABS logo with configurable classes.
frontend/src/components/DeleteWebsiteCar: Component for confirming and executing permanent website deletion with validation, error handling, and success state UI.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary that catches unexpected errors and displays a reload prompt with error details.
frontend/src/components/OwnerNotAuthoriz: Card shown to unauthorized users displaying their principal ID, copy button, and optional navigation actions.
frontend/src/components/RatePricingSecti: Displays pricing tables and notes, including hourly rates, local transfers, rentals, and additional charge info.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppLinkCard: Provides copy and open actions for customer and owner share links, with disabled state if site is deleted.
frontend/src/components/SiteDeletedScree: Full‑screen message indicating a website has been permanently deleted with support contact info.
frontend/src/components/TripTotalCalcula: UI component that calculates trip cost based on vehicle type, trip type, and distance using rate utilities.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Displays the user's avatar using fetched profile data with fallback handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendActor.ts: Enhanced actor hook that handles identity state, admin token initialization, error reporting, and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, login/logout handling, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: React hook for reading and writing JSON values to localStorage with SSR safety.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for booking leads, user permissions, and other backend interactions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark theme variables and base styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts React, sets up QueryClient, and wraps the app with Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/BookingFormPage.tsx: Booking form page that validates input, submits a booking lead, and shows success or error states.
frontend/src/pages/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays booking leads with polling, admin/owner authorization checks, and optional audio notifications for new leads.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with conditional navigation and mode-based buttons for booking, leads, and rate card.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile management page allowing users to initialize a profile, upload a display picture, and copy shareable profile links.
frontend/src/pages/RateCardPage.tsx: Rate card viewer and admin upload page supporting file upload with progress and file download.
frontend/src/utils/appMode.ts: Utility for determining and persisting whether the app runs in customer or owner mode.
frontend/src/utils/canonicalUrl.ts: Generates canonical shareable URLs with optional mode and deep-link parameters and supports copying them to the clipboard.
frontend/src/utils/download.ts: Utility to trigger browser download of provided bytes as a file.
frontend/src/utils/mapBackendError.ts: Maps backend error strings to user-friendly messages and returns both the mapped message and raw error.
frontend/src/utils/rates.ts: Defines rate constants and helper functions for vehicle pricing, allowances, and coverage calculations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and layout settings for the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes the current project state, existing features, and pending requests related to site deletion and access control.
